div.head: The Ambassador in Argentina (Weddell) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Buenos Aires, June 22, 1935—11 a.m.
[Received June 22—10:55 a.m.]

div.p: 98. From Gibson. The Protocols have been ratified and Saavedra Lamas has just called a meeting of the mediatory group for 6 o’clock this afternoon in order that it may request the President of the Argentine Republic to issue invitations to the Peace Conference. If the Department wishes me to suggest extension of membership such action will in the circumstances have to be taken at this evening’s meeting and full instructions should therefore be sent me immediately. [Gibson.]
